description: A mild viral infection of the upper respiratory tract.
self_care: Rest, fluids, and over-the-counter symptom relief. Usually resolves in 7-10 days.

description: A contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses.
self_care: Rest, fluids, and fever control. Contact a clinician if severe or high-risk.

symptoms: fever;dry cough;fatigue;loss of taste;loss of smell;shortness of breath;sore throat
description: An infectious disease caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus.
self_care: Isolate, rest, monitor breathing, and test. Seek care if breathing worsens.

symptoms: headache;nausea;sensitivity to light;sensitivity to sound;visual aura;dizziness
description: A neurological condition marked by intense, often one-sided headaches.
self_care: Rest in a dark, quiet room; use prescribed migraine medication if available.

description: A common headache linked to muscle tension and stress.
self_care: Rest, hydration, stress reduction, and gentle stretching.

description: Inflammation of the stomach and intestines, often viral.
self_care: Prioritize fluids and electrolytes; seek care for signs of dehydration.

description: Illness caused by eating contaminated food.
self_care: Rest and rehydrate; seek care if symptoms are severe or persistent.

description: An allergic response causing cold-like symptoms.
A chronic condition that inflames and narrows the airways.
self_care: Use prescribed inhalers; seek urgent care for severe breathing difficulty.

description: Inflammation of the bronchial tubes carrying air to the lungs.
self_care: Rest, fluids, and humidified air; see a clinician if it persists.

description: An infection that inflames the air sacs in the lungs.
self_care: Requires medical evaluation; may need antibiotics or hospital care.

description: An infection in any part of the urinary system.
self_care: See a clinician; often treated with antibiotics. Drink plenty of water.

description: A bacterial throat infection caused by group A streptococcus.
self_care: See a clinician for testing; antibiotics may be prescribed.

description: Inflammation of the sinuses, often following a cold.
self_care: Rest, fluids, saline rinses; see a clinician if symptoms persist.

description: A harmful loss of body fluids and electrolytes.
self_care: Rehydrate with water and electrolytes; seek care if severe.

symptoms: fatigue;pale skin;shortness of breath;dizziness;cold hands;rapid heartbeat
description: A condition of too few healthy red blood cells to carry oxygen.
self_care: Requires evaluation for the underlying cause; may need dietary changes or supplements.

symptoms: increased thirst;frequent urination;fatigue;blurred vision;slow healing;increased hunger
description: A chronic condition affecting how the body regulates blood sugar.
self_care: Requires clinical diagnosis and long-term management of blood sugar.

symptoms: chest pain;shortness of breath;pain radiating to arm;sweating;dizziness;nausea
description: Symptoms that may indicate a heart attack or other serious heart problem.
self_care: Do not wait. This pattern requires emergency evaluation immediately.

symptoms: face drooping;slurred speech;arm weakness;confusion;sudden headache;vision loss
description: Symptoms that may indicate a stroke, where blood flow to the brain is disrupted.
self_care: Call emergency services immediately. Every minute matters.
